title: cyphocarpa orthacantha
intro: Cyphocarpa orthacantha is a species of plant in the family Amaranthaceae, commonly known as a type of weed that is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Cyphocarpa orthacantha include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, making it useful for wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Cyphocarpa orthacantha include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
